events.description: Studio 8 Dance Winter Dance Performance for all students. Date: Thursday, December 11, 2025. In-class performances for all students; see flyer for class-specific performance times and venue address (111 N Wiget Lane, Walnut Creek, CA). Studio contact/address in email: Studio 8 Dance, 3233 Danville Blvd, Alamo, CA 94507.
